name: OLD SECOND BANCORP INC
summary: PARTI Item 1. Busines s General Old Second Bancorp,Inc. is a corporation organized under the laws of the State of Delaware in 1981 that serves as the bank holding company for its wholly-owned subsidiary bank, Old Second National Bank. Old Second National Bank (the Bank) is a national banking association headquartered in Aurora, Illinois, that operates through 55 banking centers located in Cook, DeKalb, DuPage, Kane, Kendall, LaSalle and Will counties in Illinois.
